---
id: get-available-nights
title: "Get available nights from a check-in date"
description: "Given a check-in date, returns the valid night durations available for a property (e.g., 3, 4, 7, 14 nights). Takes into account subsequent bookings, minimum stay rules, and short break configuration. Use this to populate a 'number of nights' dropdown after the guest selects a check-in date."
sidebar_label: "Get available nights from a check-in date"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get available nights from a check-in date"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}/available-nights"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Given a check-in date, returns the valid night durations available for a property (e.g., 3, 4, 7, 14 nights). Takes into account subsequent bookings, minimum stay rules, and short break configuration. Use this to populate a "number of nights" dropdown after the guest selects a check-in date.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
